subject: A weary elf survivor crouched in dense woods, gripping a worn handheld camcorder with a small red recording light, watching warily through the foliage
description: A dark-skinned elf with pointed ears, tied-back hair and a tense, alert expression crouches low among thick green undergrowth. She holds an old-style handheld video camera up to her shoulder, its small red record light glowing. Her clothing is practical and ragged — a fitted sleeveless top, harness straps, and gear suggestive of someone who has been on the run. Tall trees and dense ferns frame her in deep green shadow, with shafts of sickly green-yellow light filtering through the canopy behind her. The mood is found-footage horror: a person filming as evidence while something off-camera looms.
foreground: crouching elf survivor holding a handheld camcorder, surrounded by ferns and low foliage
background: dense dark forest with tall trunks and an eerie greenish backlight cutting through the canopy
emotion: wary, hyper-alert, holding breath; the look of prey watching a predator
